body: ## [1.6.3](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.6.2...v1.6.3) (2016-07-11) ### Bug Fixes * **Hits:** always render hits ([2e7bf8a](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/2e7bf8a)), closes [#1100](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1100)
